subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from the All-Merciful unto him who hath turned towards the Kaaba of Being and hath believed in God, the Mighty, the Loving [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدی الرحمن لمن اقبل الی کعبه الوجود آمن  باالله  العزیز الودود قد
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @praise and encouragement, @consolation and comfort
